2026-05-01T20:10:03.5310751Z Found 1 noop item(s)
2026-05-01T20:10:03.5317377Z No-op message 1: No action needed: SkiaSharp is already at Skia milestone 147. The upstream chrome/m147 branch was merged into mono/skia's `skiasharp` branch (commit 6f8139adf7, "Merge upstream chrome/m147 (#184)"), and SkiaSharp's `main` branch already has the submodule pointing to that commit. scripts/VERSIONS.txt shows `milestone 147` and cgmanifest.json shows `chrome_milestone: 147`. Updating from m147 to m147 is a no-op — there is no newer upstream state to merge.
